articles.title: 'I thought I was going to die' - Venezuelans describe earthquake panic
articles.description: Buildings were flattened in the capital Caracas, where voices have been heard calling from the rubble.
articles.titleJa: 「死ぬかと思った」ベネズエラ人が語る地震パニック
articles.summary: 首都カラカスで地震が発生し建物が倒壊、瓦礫から助けを求める声が聞かれ、住民は死の恐怖を語った。

articles.title: France, UK and Spain see record temperatures as heatwave grips western Europe
articles.description: Tens of millions of people are grappling with punishing temperatures, which have led to red heat alerts across the continent.
articles.titleJa: フランス、英国、スペインが記録的猛暑、西ヨーロッパを熱波が襲う
articles.summary: 西ヨーロッパで記録的熱波が発生。フランス、英国、スペインなどで観測史上最高の気温となり、数千万人が猛暑に苦しんでいる。

articles.title: Trump asks Congress for billions for Iran war, after tension with Republicans
articles.description: But the budget faces an uphill battle as the president spars with some members of his own party over the issue.
articles.titleJa: トランプ大統領、イラン戦争に数十億ドルを議会に要求、共和党との緊張高まる
articles.summary: トランプ大統領がイラン戦争のための数十億ドルの予算を議会に要求したが、共和党の一部議員との対立により予算案は難航する見込み。

articles.title: Oil price falls back to pre-Iran war levels
articles.description: Signs that traffic through the key Strait of Hormuz shipping route is gradually resuming has helped to push the oil price down.
articles.titleJa: 原油価格、イラン戦争前の水準に下落
articles.summary: 重要なホルムズ海峡の航路が徐々に再開されつつある兆候が見られ、これにより原油価格はイラン戦争前の水準まで押し下げられた。

articles.title: Philippines bans video game played by alleged high school shooter
articles.description: The rare school shooting that left three students killed and 20 others injured has shocked the country.
articles.titleJa: フィリピン、高校銃乱射事件の容疑者がプレイしていたゲームを禁止
articles.summary: 3人の生徒が死亡し、20人が負傷した異例の高校銃乱射事件を受け、フィリピン政府は容疑者がプレイしていたとされるビデオゲームを禁止した。

articles.title: IBM hails new 'block of flats' design breakthrough for ultra tiny chips
articles.description: IBM says it has created the world's first known chip tech below 1 nanometre - but it will be some time before it's ready for production.
articles.titleJa: IBM、超小型チップ向けの新「集合住宅型」設計の画期的な進歩を称賛
articles.summary: IBMが1ナノメートル以下の世界初のチップ技術を開発したと発表。この革新的な「集合住宅型」設計チップは、製品化までにはまだ時間を要する見込み。

articles.title: Ryanair says it will reluctantly let parents sit with children for free
articles.description: The airline had typically charged adults a fee of £8 each way to sit with their young children.
articles.titleJa: ライアンエアー、保護者の幼児との着席を渋々無料化へ
articles.summary: 格安航空会社ライアンエアーが、これまで幼児を連れた保護者から徴収していた座席指定料金8ポンドを撤廃し、渋々ながら無料化することを発表した。

articles.title: Police seal off key roads in Nairobi as Kenyans march to remember protest victims
articles.description: Protesters demand justice for more than 80 people killed during the 2024 demonstrations and last year's anniversary protests.
articles.titleJa: ナイロビで主要道路を封鎖、ケニア人が抗議行動の犠牲者を追悼行進
articles.summary: ナイロビで警察が主要道路を封鎖する中、2024年と昨年の抗議デモで殺害された80人以上の犠牲者のために、ケニア人が正義を求め行進した。

articles.title: Anthropic accuses Chinese rival Alibaba of illicitly extracting AI capabilities
articles.description: The firm alleged that Alibaba used fraudulent accounts to access data from its Claude AI model.
articles.titleJa: Anthropic、中国のライバルAlibabaがAI能力を不正抽出したと非難
articles.summary: AI企業Anthropicが、中国のAlibabaが不正なアカウントを利用して自社のAIモデル「Claude」のデータにアクセスし、能力を不正に抽出したと告発した。

articles.title: Independent MPs launch new Australian centrist party
articles.description: Zali Steggall and Allegra Spender say Community Strong Australia will offer citizens 'reason over rage'.
articles.titleJa: オーストラリアで独立系議員が新中道政党を結成
articles.summary: オーストラリアの独立系議員らが「コミュニティ・ストロング・オーストラリア」という新中道政党を結成。「怒りではなく理性」を国民に提供すると表明した。

articles.title: Fact check: No, Zelenskyy wasn't killed in a Russian airstrike
articles.description: Amid a flare-up in violence between Russia and Ukraine, viral posts claim Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy has died. DW Fact check takes a closer look.
articles.titleJa: ファクトチェック：ゼレンスキーはロシアの空爆で死亡しなかった
articles.summary: ロシアとウクライナ間の暴力が再燃する中、ゼレンスキー大統領が死亡したというデマが拡散。記事はこれを否定し、情報の真偽を検証する。

articles.title: Europe heat wave: No respite as extreme heat continues
articles.description: Some 101 million people in Europe will likely see temperatures above 35 C on Thursday, an analysis shows. And Germany is expecting things to warm up even more. DW has the latest.
articles.titleJa: ヨーロッパ熱波：猛暑が続き、一時の猶予もなし
articles.summary: ヨーロッパでは1億人以上が35度を超える猛暑に見舞われる見込み。ドイツも気温上昇が予想され、 continent全体で極度の暑さが継続している。

articles.title: Germany news: Deutsche Bahn advises against travel amid heat
articles.description: Germany's national rail operator is allowing passengers to cancel trips because of the heat. Meanwhile, as Germany prepare for their next World Cup match, in-form striker Deniz Undav will stay on the bench. DW has more.
articles.titleJa: ドイツニュース：ドイツ鉄道、熱波のため旅行を控えるよう勧告
articles.summary: ドイツの国鉄は熱波のため乗客の旅行キャンセルを許可。また、ドイツのワールドカップ次戦では好調のフォワード、デニス・ウンダフはベンチスタートとなる。

articles.title: India braces for drought as El Nino threatens monsoon rains
articles.description: Officials and farmers in India are preparing for what meteorologists say could be the driest monsoon season in a decade.
articles.titleJa: インド、エルニーニョ現象がモンスーンの雨を脅かす中、干ばつに備える
articles.summary: インドの当局と農民は、気象学者が過去10年で最も乾燥したモンスーンになる可能性があると予測している状況に対し、干ばつへの備えを進めている。

articles.title: How countries live with earthquakes and build resilience
articles.description: Earthquakes are a fact of nature, but living with earthquakes doesn't have to mean living in fear. DW takes a closer look at some countries showing how preparation, innovation and determination can save lives.
articles.titleJa: 各国が地震と共存し、レジリエンスを構築する方法
articles.summary: 地震は自然現象だが、恐れて暮らす必要はない。記事は、準備、革新、決意が命を救うことを示す国々の取り組みに焦点を当て、レジリエンス構築の重要性を解説する。

articles.title: Why is Germany taking a big stake in a major tankmaker?
articles.description: The German government will buy a 40% stake in tankmaker KNDS. The deal is as much about control in the critical defense sector as it is about the Franco-German relationship.
articles.titleJa: なぜドイツは主要戦車メーカーに多額の出資をするのか？
articles.summary: ドイツ政府が戦車メーカーKNDSに40%出資。これは防衛分野における支配権確保と独仏関係の強化を目的とした、戦略的な取引である。

articles.title: Iran: Rubio says US rejects any nation's claim over Hormuz
articles.description: Marco Rubio says the US will not accept that the Strait of Hormuz belongs to any country. Meanwhile, Iran's Revolutionary Guard has warned against any crossings of Hormuz without authorization. Follow DW for more.
articles.titleJa: イラン：ルビオ議員、米国はホルムズ海峡に対するいかなる国の主張も拒否すると発言
articles.summary: マルコ・ルビオ議員は米国がホルムズ海峡へのいかなる国の主張も認めないとの立場を表明。一方、イラン革命防衛隊は無許可の海峡通過に警告を発し、緊張が高まる。

articles.title: Kenya's Gen Z protests still echo two years on
articles.description: Two years after youth-led protests shook Kenya, activists say the issues remain unresolved. As Gen Z marks the anniversary, the decentralized movement continues to shape politics, demand justice and challenge power.
articles.titleJa: ケニアのZ世代による抗議活動、2年経った今も続く影響
articles.summary: ケニアで若者主導の抗議活動が起きてから2年。活動家たちは問題が未解決のままだと指摘。Z世代の分散型運動は、政治を形成し、正義を要求し、権力に異議を唱え続けている。

articles.title: US: Trump feuds with Senators after rare Iran war rebuke
articles.description: US President Donald Trump abruptly canceled a housing bill signing ceremony and clashed with certain Senators after a rare motion seeking to rein in his war with Iran. The Senate passed a new motion following the feud.
articles.titleJa: 米国：トランプ大統領、イラン戦争非難を受け上院議員と対立
articles.summary: トランプ米大統領は、イランとの戦争権限を抑制する異例の動議の後、住宅法案署名式を中止し、一部の上院議員と衝突。上院はこの対立を受けて新たな動議を可決した。

articles.title: India: Passport not proof of citizenship, ministry says, sparking social media debate
articles.description: The Ministry of External Affairs has said that the passport does not prove citizenship in India. People are now asking on social media how else they can prove that they are Indians. DW has the latest.
articles.titleJa: インド：パスポートは市民権の証明ではないと省が発言、SNSで議論を呼ぶ
articles.summary: インド外務省がパスポートは市民権の証明ではないと発表し、SNS上で国民がどのようにインド人であることを証明すべきかという議論が巻き起こっている。

articles.title: France confirms first Ebola case in doctor who had worked in DRC
articles.description:
French health ministry says patient’s contacts are being traced and that risk to European public is very low
The first case of Ebola has been confirmed in France, the country’s health ministry has said, in a doctor who had returned from a humanitarian mission to an area affected by the outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo.
The patient was transferred to a specialist facility and was in a stable condition, the ministry said in a statement. “All precautionary measures, including the patient’s isolation, were taken upon his arrival in the country, with transfer to the hospital under secure conditions to prevent any risk of contamination.”
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: フランス、コンゴ民主共和国で活動した医師に初のエボラ出血熱感染を確認
articles.summary: フランス保健省は、コンゴ民主共和国から帰国した医師がエボラ出血熱に感染したと確認。患者は隔離され安定状態。欧州への感染リスクは低いとされている。

articles.title: Play puts spotlight on Kenya’s crisis of gender-based violence
articles.description:
Autobiographical work Free Me aims to encourage victims to speak out in country where violence against women is rising
There are audible gasps in the auditorium in Nairobi as a husband launches a volley of blows and slaps on his wife and pushes her to the floor. “I wish I could spare you this,” the wife tells the audience. “My husband beat me up as if we were in a bar fight. Except, in a bar someone fights back.”
The scene comes from Free Me, an autobiographical play by Gathoni Kimuyu, a Kenyan theatre and TV producer who lived through an abusive marriage.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 演劇がケニアのジェンダーに基づく暴力危機に焦点を当てる
articles.summary: ケニアのナイロビで上演された演劇「Free Me」は、同国のジェンダーに基づく暴力の危機に焦点を当てる。作者自身の体験に基づき、被害者が声を上げることを促すのが狙い。

articles.title: Kenyan minister orders halt to construction of US Ebola facility
articles.description:
Decision comes after Aden Duale was held in contempt for ignoring previous high court ruling to stop work  
Kenya’s health minister told a court he had ordered preparations for a US-run Ebola quarantine facility to stop, after being held in contempt for ignoring a previous order to end work.
Many Kenyans strongly oppose the facility, with deadly protests erupting since the complex was announced in May for US citizens evacuated from the Democratic Republic of Congo, which is grappling with a widespread Ebola outbreak.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ケニア大臣、米国によるエボラ施設建設中止を命令
articles.summary: ケニア保健大臣は、以前の裁判所命令を無視したとして侮辱罪に問われた後、米国が運営するエボラ隔離施設の建設中止を命じた。この施設は国民から強い反対を受けている。

articles.title: UK prioritised ties with UAE over averting mass atrocities in Sudan, MPs to be told
articles.description:
Foreign Office failed to act on warnings of genocide due to ‘pressure’ from emirates, Yale human rights investigator will tell a parliamentary select committee
The British government had received intelligence that Ethiopia appeared to be supporting a genocidal militia in Sudan’s civil war as far back as 2024 but did not go public with the news for fear of upsetting the United Arab Emirates (UAE), a parliamentary committee will hear.
In May 2024, officials from the Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office (FCDO) told Nathaniel Raymond, an American human rights investigator at Yale University, that “significant private pressure” from the UAE meant the UK would not publicly divulge information linking Ethiopia and the emirates to their support for the paramilitary Rapid Support Forces.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 英国、スーダンでの大量残虐行為防止よりもUAEとの関係を優先したと議員に告げられる見込み
articles.summary: 英国がスーダンでの残虐行為防止よりもUAEとの関係を優先したと、議会委に告げられる見込み。エチオピアが民兵を支援していたが、UAEからの圧力で非公表にされたとされる。

articles.title: Sweat, tears and camaraderie as 20,000 runners take on world’s largest ultramarathon
articles.description:
For one day every June, South Africa’s searing racial inequality seems to melt away at Comrades race
In the early morning dark, thousands of runners waited, jostling with anticipation. South Africa’s national anthem rang out. Then the haunting swell of Shosholoza, first sung by Zimbabwean migrant workers in South Africa’s goldmines. Finally, that unmistakable, spine-tingling piano: Chariots of Fire.
Runners gather before the start of the marathon
 Continue reading...

articles.title: Venezuela earthquakes: ‘intensive’ search for survivors as death toll rises to 164 – latest updates
articles.description:
Delcy Rodríguez said authorities were shifting rescue teams from other parts of the country to the hardest-hit La Guaira area

Venezuela hit by double earthquake as experts warn of high death toll

Have you been affected by the earthquakes in Venezuela?

Volunteers, medics and relatives of victims have raced to the Altamira area in Caracas hoping to help save survivors from the rubble of collapsed buildings there.
“I live far away [but] ... I came here riding my motorbike as fast as I could,” said José Morillo, as he arrived outside a block of flats called Residencias Obelisco.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ベネズエラ地震：死者164人に増加、生存者「集中的」捜索 – 最新情報
articles.summary: ベネズエラ地震で死者164人に増加。被災地ラ・グアイラでは集中的な生存者捜索が続く。救助隊が国内各地から派遣され、崩壊した建物の下敷きになった人々を救出中。

articles.title: Venezuela declares state of emergency after deadly twin earthquakes
articles.description:
Second quake, at magnitude 7.5, was most powerful to strike the country since 1900, collapsing buildings in capital

Venezuela earthquake – latest updates

Venezuela’s interim leader, Delcy Rodríguez, has declared a state of emergency after the country was struck by two powerful earthquakes that collapsed dozens of buildings and killed at least 164 people, a toll that it is feared could rise significantly.
Rodríguez said 971 people were injured and more casualties were expected. The two strong earthquakes hit within a minute of each other shortly after 6pm local time on Wednesday. The first had a magnitude of 7.2 and the second 7.5, the most powerful to strike the country since 1900, according to the US Geological Survey (USGS).
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ベネズエラ、壊滅的な双子地震の後、非常事態を宣言
articles.summary: ベネズエラでM7.2とM7.5の双子地震が発生し、建物が倒壊し死者164人。暫定指導者が非常事態を宣言、死傷者はさらに増える恐れがある。1900年以来で最も強力な地震。

articles.title: Datacentres facing increase in global climate-related legal cases, report finds
articles.description:
LSE analysis highlights litigation linked to energy sources, water consumption and air pollution
The proliferation of datacentres and AI is increasingly at the forefront of environmental litigation around the world, from the US and UK to Chile to Ireland, a report has found.
In an analysis of about 3,600 climate-related lawsuits filed since 2015, the latest annual review of climate litigation by the London School of Economics (LSE) found a growing number of cases challenging the energy sources, water consumption and air pollution of datacentres, all of which have related climate implications.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: データセンター、地球規模で気候関連の訴訟が増加中と報告書が指摘
articles.summary: LSEの報告書は、データセンターとAIの普及が気候関連の訴訟を世界的に増加させていると指摘。エネルギー源、水消費、大気汚染に関する訴訟が2015年以降3,600件超え。

articles.title: Duck off: World Cup hero Merlín barred from Mexico game due to Fifa’s animal ban
articles.description:
World’s sixth-most famous duck falls short of dream

Two-year-old must watch Czechia game from distance

Merlín the duck’s bid to see his beloved Mexico live has hit a snag after he was barred from El Tri’s match with Czechia on Wednesday.
Merlín has become a folk hero in Mexico after becoming a symbol of El Tri’s World Cup campaign on home soil. His fans had launched a campaign for Merlín to attend Wednesday’s match alongside his human family. But his journey was cut short by Fifa regulations.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ダック・オフ：ワールドカップの英雄「マーリン」がFIFAの動物禁止規定によりメキシコ戦から締め出される
articles.summary: ワールドカップの英雄「マーリン」というアヒルが、FIFAの動物禁止規定によりメキシコ戦への入場を拒否された。メキシコ代表のシンボルとして親しまれてきたが、スタジアム観戦は叶わず。

articles.title: Brazilian federal police arrest Spanish citizen at São Paulo airport for racism
articles.description:
Woman detained at airport after allegedly making racist remarks directed at workers unloading baggage, police say
Brazil’s federal police have detained a Spanish citizen in São Paulo’s international Guarulhos airport for racism, in the latest of a series of high-profile arrests of foreign tourists on similar grounds.
Brazil has some of the strictest anti-racism laws in Latin America. Insulting a person on the basis of race carries a penalty of imprisonment from two to five years and a fine.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ブラジル連邦警察、サンパウロ空港でスペイン国籍の人物を人種差別容疑で逮捕
articles.summary: ブラジル連邦警察は、サンパウロ空港で荷物係員に人種差別的発言をしたスペイン国籍の人物を逮捕。ブラジルはラテンアメリカで最も厳格な反人種差別法を有し、違反には重い罰則がある。

articles.title: How much do we really know about microplastics? | Euronews Tech Talks
articles.description: Microplastics pollute our planet, raising questions about their impact on human health and the environment. This Q&A episode of Euronews Tech Talks sums up what science knows, and does not know, about them.
articles.titleJa: マイクロプラスチックについて、私たちはどこまで知っているのか？ | ユーロニュース テックトーク
articles.summary: マイクロプラスチックが地球を汚染し、その人間や環境への影響が問われている。本エピソードでは、マイクロプラスチックに関する科学的知見を解説。

articles.title: International community pledges aid to Venezuela after devastating earthquakes
articles.description: The United States Geological Survey has estimated that the final death toll could be between 10,000 and 100,000 people.
articles.titleJa: ベネズエラ、壊滅的な地震後に国際社会が援助を誓約
articles.summary: ベネズエラで壊滅的な地震が発生し、米国地質調査所は最終的な死者数を1万人から10万人と推定。国際社会は援助を表明した。

articles.title: Bigger than Jupiter, lighter than cotton candy: Astronomers discover two ‘super-puff’ planets
articles.description: The two planets orbiting a star 1,110 light-years away are the biggest exoplanets ever found with a density lower than cotton candy, and may be mostly made of hydrogen and helium.
articles.titleJa: 木星より大きく綿菓子より軽い：「スーパーパフ」惑星2つを発見
articles.summary: 1110光年離れた星を周回する2つの惑星が発見された。これらは綿菓子より密度が低く、水素とヘリウムで構成されているとみられ、これまで見つかった中で最大の系外惑星。

articles.title: Europe summer travel trends: Short breaks, family holidays and coolcations drive demand
articles.description: From quick getaways to heatwave-avoiding escapes, new data from Trip.com reveals the trends that are shaping summer travel across Europe in 2026.
articles.titleJa: ヨーロッパの夏季旅行トレンド：短期休暇、家族旅行、涼しい避暑地が需要を牽引
articles.summary: Trip.comの新しいデータによると、2026年のヨーロッパ夏季旅行は、短期休暇や酷暑を避ける涼しい避暑地への旅行が人気。

articles.title: Parisians living in attic apartments are roasting under the city's pretty zinc roofs
articles.description: In France's historic heatwave, Paris’ dreamy rooftops become a heat-trapping nightmare.
articles.titleJa: パリの屋根裏アパート住人、美しい亜鉛屋根の下で灼熱地獄
articles.summary: フランスの歴史的な熱波により、パリの美しい屋根裏アパートが熱を閉じ込める悪夢に。パリジャンたちは酷暑に苦しんでいる。

articles.title: Mediterranean travel trends: How ‘blue mind experiences’ and local culture keep people coming back
articles.description: As fly-and-flop holidays fall out of fashion, travellers are looking for more meaningful travel experiences even while prioritising sun and sea.
articles.titleJa: 地中海旅行トレンド：「ブルーマインド体験」と地元文化が人々を惹きつける理由
articles.summary: 「寝そべり休暇」が時代遅れとなる中、旅行者は日差しと海を優先しつつ、より意義深い地中海の旅行体験を求めている。

articles.title: SpaceX has quietly launched a spacecraft almost no one knew existed
articles.description: Rumours have circulated that it could be used to transport military hardware.
articles.titleJa: SpaceXがほとんど知られていなかった宇宙船を密かに打ち上げ
articles.summary: SpaceXが秘密裏に宇宙船を打ち上げた。軍事ハードウェアの輸送に使われる可能性が噂されている。

articles.title: Phoebe Bridgers announces new album after solo hiatus
articles.description: The American singer is coming back with her third solo record 'Lost Weekend' ahead of a US and European tour starting in September.
articles.titleJa: フィービー・ブリジャーズ、ソロ活動休止を経てニューアルバムを発表
articles.summary: アメリカ人歌手のフィービー・ブリジャーズが、ソロ3作目となるアルバム「Lost Weekend」を発表。9月からの米国・欧州ツアーに先駆けて。

articles.title: US-Iran talks could derail fragile peace process, says ex-Israeli spokesperson
articles.description: Former Israeli government spokesperson Eylon Levy believes Israel's campaign is "creating the urgency and opportunity" for Lebanon to confront Hezbollah. Levy said that if Lebanon is "capable of dismantling Hezbollah", it could mark the beginning of "a beautiful peace between Israel and Lebanon.

articles.title: Three years of Pride: Santiago Méndez’s visual archive of queer Venezuela

articles.title: Trade Policy Review: Philippines
articles.description: The sixth review of the trade policies and practices of the Philippines takes place on 24 and 26 June 2026. The basis for the review is a report by the WTO Secretariat and a report by the Government of the Philippines.
articles.titleJa: 貿易政策レビュー：フィリピン
articles.summary: WTOは、フィリピンの貿易政策と慣行に関する第6回レビューを2026年6月24日と26日に実施する。

articles.title: DDG Nordquist highlights role of trade remedies amid global trade challenges at Seoul Forum
articles.description: Speaking at the 24th Seoul International Forum on Trade Remedies on 23 June, WTO Deputy Director-General DJ Nordquist underscored the importance of transparent and predictable trade remedy practices in a period of heightened uncertainty for the global trading system. She highlighted the continued resilience of global trade, the growing use of trade remedy instruments by members, and the need for WTO reform to ensure that the multilateral trading system remains responsive to contemporary economic realities and emerging trade challenges. Her full remarks are below.
articles.titleJa: ノードクイスト事務次長、ソウルフォーラムで世界貿易の課題における貿易救済措置の役割を強調

articles.title: Panel to review Indian measures on solar, IT goods; members share views on reform talks
articles.description: The Dispute Settlement Body (DSB) agreed at its meeting on 23 June to a request from China for the establishment of a panel to review measures in India affecting imports of solar cells, solar modules and information technology goods. The DSB Chair, Ambassador Guilherme de Aguiar Patriota (Brazil), convened an informal discussion after the meeting to take stock of members' positions on dispute settlement reform.
articles.titleJa: インドの太陽光・IT製品に関する措置を審査するパネル設置、改革交渉についても意見交換

articles.title: Final oral round of John H. Jackson Moot Court Competition underway at the WTO
articles.description: The final oral round of the 24th edition of the John H. Jackson Moot Court Competition on WTO Law opened on 23 June, bringing together 24 student teams from 13 WTO members to compete in Geneva. The WTO Dispute Settlement Body Chair, Ambassador Guilherme de Aguiar Patriota of Brazil, welcomed the students participating in the week-long round, which will see teams present arguments before panels of WTO law experts, culminating in the grand final to be held between two teams on Saturday, 27 June.
articles.titleJa: WTOでジョン・H・ジャクソン模擬裁判大会の最終口頭弁論ラウンドが進行中

articles.title: DDG Hill: In an uncertain world, resilience is integral to the trading system’s design
articles.description: Speaking at the Shaping the Future of Shipping Summit on 23 June 2026 in Rome, WTO Deputy Director-General Johanna Hill underscored the role of international trade in cushioning the impact of global disruptions. Since the early 2020s, she observed, economic shocks and disruptions to shipping routes have become a recurring feature of the global trading landscape, though the system has shown resilience in absorbing and adapting to these shocks.
articles.titleJa: ヒル事務次長：不確実な世界において、回復力は貿易システムの設計に不可欠

articles.title: Information Technology Agreement's role in AI readiness highlighted in thematic session
articles.description: The Information Technology Agreement (ITA) Committee on 23 June held a thematic session featuring presentations from public and private sector experts on how the ITA can be harnessed to enhance access to AI-enabling technologies, particularly for developing economies and least-developed countries (LDCs). The session aimed to enhance awareness of AI's high dependence on information and communication technology (ICT) infrastructure, and how eliminating tariffs on hardware – such as chips and servers – under the ITA helps reduce costs, accelerates the deployment of frontier technologies and stimulates inward investment in this sector.
articles.titleJa: 情報技術協定がAI対応において果たす役割がテーマ別セッションで強調

articles.title: Global Review to explore strengthening partnerships for trade development

The event will bring together trade and development practitioners, including ministers, heads of international organizations and experts.
articles.titleJa: 貿易開発のためのパートナーシップ強化を探るグローバルレビュー

articles.title: WTO members review temporary US import surcharges
articles.description: The Committee on Balance of Payments Restrictions (BOP) held consultations on 22 June 2026 to discuss a 10% import surcharge adopted by the United States to address its BOP deficit. WTO members heard a statement from the United States. They also considered a statement of the International Monetary Fund (IMF) on the US BOP situation and a background note prepared by the WTO Secretariat. The United States responded to members’ questions and indicated that the temporary measure is expected to expire on 24 July 2026.
articles.titleJa: WTO加盟国、米国の一時的な輸入追加関税を審査
articles.summary: WTOが米国の国際収支赤字対策として導入された10%の輸入追加関税について協議。米国は一時的な措置であり7月24日に期限切れと説明した。

articles.title: WTO Young Trade Leaders end impactful year with high-level event, issue report
articles.description: The 2025 cohort of WTO Young Trade Leaders concluded their year of activities on 18 June, issuing a report on the future of the WTO at an event in Geneva and meeting with Director-General Ngozi Okonjo-Iweala. The visit was organized in partnership with the Friedrich-Ebert-Stiftung (FES).
articles.titleJa: WTO若手貿易リーダー、高レベルイベントと報告書発行で実り多き一年を締めくくる
articles.summary: WTO若手貿易リーダー2025年グループが活動を終了し、ジュネーブでWTOの未来に関する報告書を発表し、事務局長と会談した。

articles.title: Conference addresses emerging research in intellectual property and digital innovation
articles.description: Artificial intelligence (AI), digitalization and technology are having a profound impact on intellectual property right protections, but how can the framework of international law keep pace with innovations? That is one question that 120 academics, researchers and policy makers debated on 18-19 June in Geneva, Switzerland. The two-day event was part of the 5th IP Researchers Europe (IPRE) Conference organized by the Faculty of Law, University of Geneva, in collaboration with the World Intellectual Property Organization (WIPO) and the WTO.
articles.titleJa: 知的財産とデジタルイノベーションの新興研究に関する会議
articles.summary: ジュネーブで開催された会議で、AI、デジタル化、技術革新が知的財産権保護と国際法に与える影響について研究者らが議論した。
